docs.title: 🏛️ The Atrium
docs.text:
Welcome to the AI Knowledge Temple, a curated sanctuary for the signals that define the next era of intelligence.

This is not a mere list of tools, but a structured distillation of the la-priori philosophy: the belief that intelligence is a compounding process of structured knowledge and autonomous evolution.

docs.title: 🌌 The Vision
docs.text: Our goal is to move from Tool-Centric AI (using LLMs as calculators) to Agent-Native Intelligence (building systems that can plan, remember, and evolve).

docs.title: 🗝️ Core Pillars
docs.text:
• Knowledge Engineering: Transforming raw data into an interlinked "Second Brain" using LLM-wiki architectures.
  • Autonomous Agency: Moving beyond chat interfaces towards agents that operate on a closed-loop evolution cycle.
  • Human Distillation: The art of extracting human expertise and encoding it into high-fidelity agent skills.

docs.title: 🧭 Navigation
docs.text: Explore the Temple through its three primary domains:

docs.title: 🗝️ The Vault
docs.text: The repository of high-signal resources. Categorized by: - Infrastructure: The bedrock of AI—compute, kernels, and runtime environments. - Agency: Frameworks and patterns for autonomous agents and orchestrators. - Cognition: The frontier of model architectures and cognitive abilities. - Data & RAG: The science of memory and external knowledge retrieval.

docs.title: 🕯️ The Sanctum
docs.text: Where signal is refined into insight. This section contains Gold-Tier Analyses and deep-dives into specific technical breakthroughs.

docs.title: 🗺️ Project Map
docs.text: A structural overview of how these discoveries interlink to form a cohesive intelligence system.

docs.title: ⚡ Current Focus
docs.text:
Currently, the Temple is evolving to support the LACP (Local Agent Control Plane) framework, focusing on the seamless integration of specialized agents with a persistent, structured knowledge base.

“The goal is not to store information, but to cultivate an evolving intelligence.”

docs.title: 🚀 Curated Resources
docs.text: A collection of "gold" resources in the AI field with paradigm-shifting potential, high utility, or architectural elegance.

docs.title: 📌 Quick Navigation
docs.text: 🤖 Core Models | 🛠️ Agent Frameworks | ⚡ Inference & Training | 📦 Data & RAG | 🏗️ Infrastructure | 📜 Research Papers

docs.title: 🗝️ The Vault: Resource Overview
docs.text: The Vault is the central repository for high-signal AI resources, organized by their role in the intelligence stack.

docs.title: 🏗️ Infrastructure
docs.text:
The foundational layer required to run and orchestrate modern AI.

Category Description Key Focus Compute GPU clouds, edge computing, and local inference engines. Efficiency & Latency Runtimes The environments where agents and models live. Stability & Isolation Observability Monitoring the trajectories and tool-use of autonomous agents. Traceability

docs.title: 🤖 Agency
docs.text:
The layer of decision-making, planning, and tool-use.

Category Description Key Focus Frameworks Orchestration layers like LACP, AutoGPT, and CrewAI. Reliability & Scale Protocols Communication standards between agents and tools. Interoperability Planning Techniques for long-horizon reasoning and task decomposition. Logic & Autonomy

docs.title: 🧠 Cognition
docs.text:
The core intelligence layer—the models and cognitive architectures.

Category Description Key Focus LLMs Frontier models (Claude, GPT, Llama) and specialized architectures. Reasoning & Capability Memory RAG, vector databases, and long-term memory architectures. Persistence & Retrieval Learning Fine-tuning, RLHF, and self-evolution mechanisms. Adaptation

docs.title: 🕯️ The Sanctum: Gold-Tier Analyses
docs.text: The Sanctum is dedicated to high-fidelity technical dissections. Each entry here is not just a summary, but a structural analysis of a breakthrough.

docs.title: [TBD] The Architecture of LACP
docs.text: Status: In Progress A deep dive into the Local Agent Control Plane, focusing on the separation of the "Gateway" from the "Execution Core" to ensure industrial-grade stability.

docs.title: [TBD] Human Distillation Protocols
docs.text: Status: In Progress Analysis of the procedural workflow used to transform human cognitive frameworks into agent-executable skills.

docs.title: [TBD] The LLM-Wiki Pattern
docs.text: Status: In Progress Exploring the a-priori structural design of knowledge bases that allow for incremental, non-destructive growth of intelligence.

docs.title: 📝 Analysis Template
docs.text:
To maintain the rigor of the Sanctum, all deep-dives follow this structure:

  1. The Signal: What is the core discovery or tool?
  2. Structural Analysis: How does it work under the hood?
  3. The Synergy: How does this integrate with the existing Intelligence Stack?
  4. The Gap: What is missing or what is the next evolutionary step?
  5. Geek Note: Technical implementation details for the curious.

The Sanctum is a living document. New insights are added as the la-priori evolution cycle produces them.

docs.title: 🗺️ Project Map: The Intelligence Ecosystem
docs.text: This map illustrates the structural interdependencies between the components of a modern, agent-native knowledge system.

docs.title: 🪐 The Intelligence Stack
docs.text: The ecosystem is composed of three interlocking layers that form a closed-loop evolution cycle:

docs.title: 1. The Perception Layer (Raw Signal)
docs.text: The entry point for new information, ranging from academic papers and GitHub repos to real-time web data. - Inputs: arXiv, GitHub, Blogs, Web Scraping. - Goal: Capture high-signal information before it becomes noise.

docs.title: 2. The Distillation Layer (Knowledge Engine)
docs.text: Where raw signal is processed into structured knowledge. This is the core of the Second Brain. - Components: - Cortex: The extraction engine. - Graphify: The structuring mechanism (turning entities into a knowledge graph). - LLM-Wiki: The persistent, interlinked storage layer. - Goal: Create "gold-tier" insights that are machine-readable and human-understandable.

docs.title: 3. The Agency Layer (The Actor)
docs.text: Where knowledge is applied to solve problems. This is the LACP (Local Agent Control Plane). - Components: - Mission Control: The interface for human-agent collaboration. - Hermes Agent: The execution core capable of tool mastery and self-evolution. - Toolkits: The physical capabilities (Terminal, Browser, File System) used by agents. - Goal: Execute tasks based on the structured knowledge in the Vault.

docs.title: 🔄 The Closed-Loop Cycle
docs.text:
The true power of this architecture lies in the Evolutionary Loop:

  1. Execution: Agents act in the real world using the current knowledge base.
  2. Evaluation: The outcome of the action is analyzed (via LACP Eval Framework).
  3. Correction: Discrepancies between intent and outcome are identified.
  4. Evolution: The knowledge base is updated, and the agent's skills are refined.

Knowledge $\rightarrow$ Action $\rightarrow$ Feedback $\rightarrow$ Knowledge

docs.title: 🏛️ 入門 (The Atrium)
docs.text:
歡迎來到 AI 知識神殿，這是一個為定義下一個智能時代而精心策劃的信號避風港。

這不僅僅是一個工具列表，而是 la-priori 哲學的結構化蒸餾：我們相信智能是結構化知識與自主演進的複利過程。

docs.title: 🌌 願景
docs.text: 我們的目標是從 以工具為中心的 AI (將 LLM 視為計算機) 轉向 Agent-Native 智能 (構建能夠規劃、記憶並自我演進的系統)。

docs.title: 🗝️ 核心支柱
docs.text:
• 知識工程 (Knowledge Engineering)：利用 LLM-wiki 架構，將原始數據轉化為互聯的「第二大腦」。
  • 自主代理 (Autonomous Agency)：超越聊天界面，邁向在閉環演進週期中運行的代理。
  • 人類蒸餾 (Human Distillation)：將人類專業知識提取並編碼為高保真 Agent 技能的藝術。

docs.title: 🧭 導航
docs.text: 透過以下三個主要領域探索神殿：

docs.title: 🗝️ 寶庫 (The Vault)
docs.text: 高信號資源的儲存庫。分類包括： - 基礎設施 (Infrastructure)：AI 的基石——算力、內核與運行環境。 - 代理 (Agency)：自主代理與編排器的框架與模式。 - 認知 (Cognition)：模型架構與認知能力的前沿。 - 數據與 RAG (Data & RAG)：記憶與外部知識檢索的科學。

docs.title: 🕯️ 聖所 (The Sanctum)
docs.text: 在這裡，信號被精煉為洞察。本節包含 金級深度分析 (Gold-Tier Analyses) 以及對特定技術突破的剖析。

docs.title: 🗺️ 項目地圖 (Project Map)
docs.text: 一個結構化概覽，展示這些發現如何互聯並形成一個凝聚的智能系統。

docs.title: ⚡ 當前焦點
docs.text:
目前，神殿正在演進以支持 LACP (Local Agent Control Plane) 框架，專注於將專業代理與持久、結構化的知識庫無縫集成。

“目標不是儲存資訊，而是培育不斷進化的智能。”

docs.title: 🚀 精選資源列表 (Curated Resources)
docs.text: 本頁面彙整了 AI 領域中具有範式轉移潛力、高實用價值或架構優美的「金級」資源。

docs.title: 🏗️ 基礎設施
docs.text:
運行和編排現代 AI 所需的基礎層。

類別 描述 關鍵焦點 算力 (Compute) GPU 雲、邊緣計算與本地推理引擎。 效率與延遲 運行環境 (Runtimes) 代理與模型生存的環境。 穩定性與隔離 可觀測性 (Observability) 監控自主代理的軌跡與工具使用。 可追溯性

docs.text:
決策、規劃與工具使用的層級。

類別 描述 關鍵焦點 框架 (Frameworks) 如 LACP, AutoGPT 和 CrewAI 等編排層。 可靠性與規模 協議 (Protocols) 代理與工具之間的通信標準。 互操作性 規劃 (Planning) 長週期推理與任務分解技術。 邏輯與自主性

docs.title: 🧠 認知 (Cognition)
docs.text:
核心智能層——模型與認知架構。

類別 描述 關鍵焦點 LLMs 前沿模型 (Claude, GPT, Llama) 與專業架構。 推理與能力 記憶 (Memory) RAG, 向量數據庫與長期記憶架構。 持久化與檢索 學習 (Learning) 微調, RLHF 與自我演進機制。 適應性

docs.title: 🕯️ 聖所：金級深度分析
docs.text: 聖所專注於高保真的技術剖析。這裡的每一條記錄不僅僅是總結，而是對一項突破的結構化分析。

docs.title: [待定] LACP 的架構
docs.text: 狀態：進行中 深入探討本地代理控制平面 (LACP)，專注於將「網關 (Gateway)」與「執行核心 (Execution Core)」分離，以確保工業級的穩定性。

docs.title: [待定] 人類蒸餾協議
docs.text: 狀態：進行中 分析將人類認知框架轉化為代理可執行技能的程序化工作流。

docs.title: [待定] LLM-Wiki 模式
docs.text: 狀態：進行中 探索知識庫的 a-priori 結構設計，使其能夠實現智能的增量式、非破壞性增長。

docs.title: 📝 分析模板
docs.text:
為了保持聖所的嚴謹性，所有深度分析均遵循以下結構：

  1. 信號 (The Signal)：核心發現或工具是什麼？
  2. 結構分析 (Structural Analysis)：其底層運作機制為何？
  3. 協同效應 (The Synergy)：它如何與現有的智能棧集成？
  4. 差距 (The Gap)：缺失了什麼，或下一個演進步驟是什麼？
  5. 極客筆記 (Geek Note)：為好奇者提供的技術實現細節。

聖所是一個活的文檔。隨著 la-priori 演進週期的推進，新的洞察將被持續添加。

docs.title: 🗺️ 項目地圖：智能生態系統
docs.text: 本圖表展示了現代 Agent-Native 知識系統中各組件之間的結構依賴關係。

docs.title: 🪐 智能棧 (The Intelligence Stack)
docs.text: 該生態系統由三個互鎖層組成，形成一個閉環演進週期：

docs.title: 1. 感知層 (Perception Layer - 原始信號)
docs.text: 新信息的入口，範圍從學術論文、GitHub 倉庫到實時網頁數據。 - 輸入：arXiv, GitHub, Blogs, 網頁抓取。 - 目標：在信息變成噪音之前捕獲高信號信息。

docs.title: 2. 蒸餾層 (Distillation Layer - 知識引擎)
docs.text: 將原始信號處理為結構化知識的地方。這是 第二大腦 (Second Brain) 的核心。 - 組件： - Cortex：提取引擎。 - Graphify：結構化機制 (將實體轉化為知識圖譜)。 - LLM-Wiki：持久化、互聯的存儲層。 - 目標：創建機器可讀且人類可理解的「金級」洞察。

docs.title: 3. 代理層 (Agency Layer - 執行者)
docs.text: 將知識應用於解決問題的地方。這就是 LACP (Local Agent Control Plane)。 - 組件： - Mission Control：人類與代理協作的界面。 - Hermes Agent：具備工具精通能力和自我演進能力的執行核心。 - 工具集 (Toolkits)：代理使用的物理能力 (終端, 瀏覽器, 文件系統)。 - 目標：根據寶庫中的結構化知識執行任務。

docs.title: 🔄 閉環循環 (The Closed-Loop Cycle)
docs.text:
此架構的真正威力在於 演進循環 (Evolutionary Loop)：

  1. 執行 (Execution)：代理使用當前知識庫在現實世界中採取行動。
  2. 評估 (Evaluation)：分析行動結果 (通過 LACP 評估框架)。
  3. 修正 (Correction)：識別意圖與結果之間的差異。
  4. 演進 (Evolution)：更新知識庫，精煉代理技能。

知識 $\rightarrow$ 行動 $\rightarrow$ 反饋 $\rightarrow$ 知識

docs.title: 📜 前沿論文 (Research Papers)
docs.text:
定義 AI 未來方向的學術突破。
